summary: Comprehensive testing of new features in LogiFlow Pro: Staff Hours (Boss/CS), Financial Ledger, Driver Orders (Navigate/Photo), Driver Earnings (Pay Boss), Boss Dashboard (Payments tab), and Photo Upload API. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Order model was missing proof_photo_id and proof_photo_path fields, causing View Delivery Proof button to not appear. Added these fields to the Order model.
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and payments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Boss Staff Hours page at /boss/staff - form with driver dropdown, date picker, hours input, Log button, and hours history. 2) CS Staff Hours page at /service/staff - same functionality. 3) Boss Financial Ledger at /boss/ledger - filters by type (orders/deposits/hours), driver, date range, search. 4) Boss bottom nav has Staff (Clock icon) and Ledger (BookOpen icon). 5) CS bottom nav has Staff icon. 6) Driver Orders page shows 'Navigate with Google Maps' button for pending delivery orders (opens Google Maps in new tab). 7) Driver Orders page shows 'Upload Delivery Proof' button for completed orders. 8) Boss can log hours for drivers via Staff page. 9) Driver can submit payment from Earnings page (Pay Boss section). 10) Boss can approve/reject payments from Dashboard Payments tab. 11) Photo upload API works (POST /api/orders/{id}/photo). 12) Boss Orders and Service Orders pages show 'View Delivery Proof' button for orders with photos.

boss_staff_page.verification: Page loads with hours form (driver dropdown, date, hours input, Log button) and hours history

cs_staff_page.verification: Page loads with same functionality as Boss Staff page

boss_ledger_page.verification: Page loads with filters (type, driver, date range) and transaction entries

boss_nav_staff_ledger.description: Boss bottom nav has Staff and Ledger icons
boss_nav_staff_ledger.verification: Staff (Clock icon) and Ledger (BookOpen icon) visible and navigate correctly

cs_nav_staff.description: CS bottom nav has Staff icon
cs_nav_staff.verification: Staff icon visible and navigates to /service/staff

driver_navigate_button.description: Driver Orders shows Navigate with Google Maps button
driver_navigate_button.verification: Button appears for pending delivery orders, opens Google Maps in new tab

driver_upload_photo_button.description: Driver Orders shows Upload Delivery Proof button
driver_upload_photo_button.verification: Button appears for completed orders without photos

boss_log_hours.description: Boss can log hours for drivers
boss_log_hours.verification: Selected driver1, entered 7.5 hours, success toast shown, history updated

driver_submit_payment.description: Driver can submit payment from Earnings page
driver_submit_payment.verification: Entered $30.00, clicked Submit Payment, success toast shown, payment appears in history

boss_approve_reject_payments.description: Boss can approve/reject payments from Dashboard
boss_approve_reject_payments.verification: Payments tab shows pending payments with Approve/Reject buttons

view_delivery_proof_boss.description: Boss Orders shows View Delivery Proof button
view_delivery_proof_boss.verification: Button appears for orders with photos, clicking expands photo

view_delivery_proof_service.description: Service Orders shows View Delivery Proof button
view_delivery_proof_service.verification: Button appears for orders with photos
